ValidationRule.description: Estimated delivery date is required when order status is changed to Placed or shipped
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Status__c)) = 'New', ISNULL(Estimated_Delivery_Date__c), OR( TEXT(Status__c) = 'Placed', TEXT(Status__c) = 'Shipped' ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Estimated Delivery Date is required when order is placed or shipped
